title: Brazilian-Style Smoked Veal Carpaccio
description: A refreshing and light Brazilian-inspired dish featuring thinly sliced smoked veal, served with a tangy crumbly topping.

ingredients.name: Crumbly cheese (such as feta or queso fresco)

instructions: 1. Arrange the thinly sliced smoked veal on a serving platter or individual plates.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the crumbly cheese, chopped cilantro, and diced red onion.
3. Drizzle the lime juice over the veal, then top with the crumbly cheese mixture.
4. Drizzle the extra-virgin olive oil over the top and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
5. Garnish with additional cilantro if desired and serve immediately.
